title: brachystelma laevigatum
intro: Brachystelma laevigatum is a succulent plant species, belonging to the family Apocynaceae, native to the tropical regions of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Brachystelma laevigatum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of the plant involve drying and crushing the leaves, then using them to make teas, infusions, or applying them topically as a poultice.
